messages: There is a water leak in Building C that has been running all morning.
The recycling bins are contaminated again and no one seems to be checking them.
I want to report that one of our suppliers may not meet our sustainability policy. They are using uncertified palm oil and I have evidence from the loading dock.

gemini_results.message: There is a water leak in Building C that has been running all morning.

result.escalation_reason: Active leak with ongoing resource waste, requires facilities response within 4 hours.
result.brief_summary: Water leak in Building C running since this morning.

gemini_results.message: The recycling bins are contaminated again and no one seems to be checking them.

result.escalation_reason: Recycling bins are contaminated, indicating a potential ongoing issue with waste management practices that requires investigation by the sustainability team.
result.brief_summary: Recycling bins are contaminated, and there is a perceived lack of oversight.

gemini_results.message: I want to report that one of our suppliers may not meet our sustainability policy. They are using uncertified palm oil and I have evidence from the loading dock.

result.escalation_reason: Potential breach of sustainability policy by a supplier requires immediate investigation by procurement.
result.brief_summary: Supplier may not meet sustainability policy; using uncertified palm oil. Evidence from loading dock.

baseline_results.message: There is a water leak in Building C that has been running all morning.
